modelName: OC1 Phishing - LLM Uplift with Uncertainty
modelDescription: An individual amateur hacker with limited resources launches untargeted phishing attacks against small-to-medium enterprises, gains access to finance employee inboxes through credential theft, and executes simplified business email compromise by modifying banking details on legitimate invoices to steal payments.

nodes.name: Initial Access
nodes.description: The actor successfully uses an exploit against a known vulnerability in a public-facing application (e.g., VPN, SharePoint, Exchange) to gain an initial foothold on the target's network.

nodes.name: Resource Development
nodes.description: The actor obtains the necessary resources, including exploit code for a known vulnerability, the RaaS payload, and operational infrastructure like C2 servers.
